testcase.name: test_01_no_interaction_not_revealed

skipped.message: Could not create/login User A: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"}

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_icebreaker_reveal_logic.py:100: Could not create/login User A: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"}

testcase.name: test_02_one_sided_glance_not_revealed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_icebreaker_reveal_logic.py:121: in test_02_one_sided_glance_not_revealed assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Glance failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Glance failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_03_mutual_glance_not_revealed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_icebreaker_reveal_logic.py:139: in test_03_mutual_glance_not_revealed assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Glance back failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Glance back failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_receiving_icebreaker_shows_pending

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have pending icebreaker from User A assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_icebreaker_reveal_logic.py:186: in test_05_receiving_icebreaker_shows_pending assert len(from_user_a) > 0, "Should have pending icebreaker from User A" E AssertionError: Should have pending icebreaker from User A E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have pending icebreaker from User A assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_07_self_card_shows_not_revealed
